ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Reinforcement learning algorithm used */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode */,
  "reward_ep" INTEGER /* Reward for this episode */,
  "mean_reward" REAL /* Mean reward for the episode */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Total steps taken in this episode */,
  "n_steps_ep" INTEGER /* Number of steps for this episode */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the episode was logged */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken */,
  "state_type" TEXT /* Type of state reached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this metric is associated with */,
  "avg_reward" REAL /* Average reward across episodes */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total steps taken across all episodes */,
  "episode_count" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes recorded */,
  "max_reward" INTEGER /* Maximum reward achieved */,
  "min_reward" INTEGER /* Minimum reward achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this hyperparameter is associated with */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this visualization is associated with */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Visualization data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
